notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Matt Olson strikes out on a foul tip. Michael Harris II to 3rd. Michael Harris II steals (5) 2nd base. Michael Harris II to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Drew Cavanaugh.
